title: 2026-04-29 Moderation Update
body: Today we addressed three high-severity reports: 1) Banned user spam_wave_42 for mass phishing spam across 6 channels. 2) Banned user toxic_runner for repeated targeted harassment of community newcomers. 3) Closed a false positive report against core_maintainer resulting from coordinated brigading. Medium and low severity reports will be reviewed in our next moderation cycle. We remain committed to keeping our community safe for all members.
